svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="SequenceDelivery" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-779" dy="-210" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1560" pageHeight="840" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;align=left;" value="Sequence — Dispatch & Delivery Completion (6-digit OTP)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="900" x="40" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ll1" parent="1" style="shape=umlLifeline;perimeter=lifelinePerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;container=1;collapsible=0;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="Vendor" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="700" width="150" x="80" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ll2" parent="1" style="shape=umlLifeline;perimeter=lifelinePerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;container=1;collapsible=0;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="DispatchService" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="700" width="150" x="320" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ll3" parent="1" style="shape=umlLifeline;perimeter=lifelinePerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;container=1;collapsible=0;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Courier
(mobile)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="700" width="150" x="580" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ll4" parent="1" style="shape=umlLifeline;perimeter=lifelinePerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;container=1;collapsible=0;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="DeliveryService" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="700" width="150" x="840" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ll5" parent="1" style="shape=umlLifeline;perimeter=lifelinePerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;container=1;collapsible=0;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Customer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="700" width="150" x="1080" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ll6" parent="1" style="shape=umlLifeline;perimeter=lifelinePerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;container=1;collapsible=0;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="DB" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="700" width="150" x="1320" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m1" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;endArrow=block;rounded=0;fontSize=11;" value="order READY_FOR_PICKUP → dispatch(order)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="155" y="150" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="395" y="150" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#6c8ebf;align=left;" value="pick first eligible courier in operatingZoneId (APPROVED + online)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="420" x="320" y="158" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m2" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;endArrow=block;rounded=0;fontSize=11;" value="create DispatchJob (ASSIGNED) + Delivery ASSIGNED"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="395" y="200" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1395" y="200" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m3" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;endArrow=block;rounded=0;fontSize=11;" value="notify new job (assignedAt, expiresAt)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="395" y="245" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="655" y="245" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m4" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;endArrow=block;rounded=0;fontSize=11;" value="accept(job)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="655" y="290" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="395" y="290" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#b85450;align=left;" value="alt: reject / expire → REASSIGNABLE → reassign, excluding prior courier" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="440" x="320" y="298" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m5" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;endArrow=block;rounded=0;fontSize=11;" value="DispatchJob ACCEPTED, Order ASSIGNED_TO_COURIER"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="395" y="345" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1395" y="345" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m6" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;endArrow=block;rounded=0;fontSize=11;" value="arrivedAtVendor → pickedUp"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="655" y="390" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="915" y="390" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m7" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;endArrow=block;rounded=0;fontSize=11;" value="Delivery PICKED_UP, Order PICKED_UP"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="915" y="435" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1395" y="435" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m8" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;endArrow=block;rounded=0;fontSize=11;" value="onRoute → arrivedAtCustomer"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="655" y="480" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="915" y="480" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m9" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;endArrow=open;dashed=1;rounded=0;fontSize=11;" value="shows 6-digit code (in person)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1155" y="525" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="655" y="525" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m10" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;endArrow=block;rounded=0;fontSize=11;" value="confirmDelivery(otp)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="655" y="570" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="915" y="570" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#9673a6;align=left;" value="verify against confirmationCodeHash · invalid attempts counted · OTP never logged" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="520" x="840" y="578" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m11" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;endArrow=block;rounded=0;fontSize=11;" value="Delivery DELIVERED, Order DELIVERED"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="915" y="625" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1395" y="625" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m12" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;endArrow=open;dashed=1;rounded=0;fontSize=11;" value="200 delivered"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="915" y="670" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="655" y="670" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
